server.name: indexer
server.description: APTL Indexer MCP Server - Raw Elasticsearch DSL queries against the Wazuh Indexer and detection rule management via the Wazuh Manager API.

query.description: Run raw Elasticsearch DSL queries against the Wazuh Indexer. Supports any valid ES query DSL. Override the index pattern via params.index. Examples: {"body": {"query": {"bool": {"must": [{"match": {"rule.id": "302010"}}]}}, "size": 5}} or {"params": {"index": "wazuh-archives-4.x-*"}, "body": {"query": {"match": {"data.srcip": "172.20.1.30"}}}}

create_rule.description:
Create or update custom Wazuh detection rules by writing to local_rules.xml via the Manager API. The body should contain the rule XML content. Example: {"body": {"content": "<group name="custom,">
  <rule id="100001" level="10">
    <description>Custom detection rule</description>
  </rule>
</group>"}}
